description_long: This is a pair of high-top canvas sneakers, predominantly black with white rubber toe caps and midsoles. The shoes feature a classic lace-up design with white laces threaded through metal eyelets. The side panels display a circular patch, commonly associated with Converse All Star branding, and the heel area has a visible rectangular label. The interior lining appears to be a muted greenish-gray fabric, adding a subtle contrast to the exterior. The shoes have a textured rubber outsole for grip and durability, and the overall construction suggests comfort and flexibility for urban walking. The sneakers are in excellent condition, showing no visible signs of wear or dirt.
description: A pair of black high-top canvas sneakers with white laces, rubber toe caps, and classic branding details. The shoes are clean, well-constructed, and designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical lacing, white toe caps, and the overall height of the high-top design.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the circular side patch, metal eyelets, and the profile of the rubber sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel labels, back seams, and the interior lining color.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side patch, laces, and the shoe's silhouette.
attribute_logo: Circular patch on the side panels with star motif, rectangular label on the heel, both in white and gray.
